name: stock_compare
description: Compare multiple stocks side-by-side on key metrics: price, P/E, market cap, RSI, revenue growth, dividend yield. Returns a formatted comparison.
instructions: Call with {"tickers": ["AAPL", "MSFT", "GOOG"]} to get side-by-side comparison. Optionally specify {"metrics": ["pe", "rsi", "market_cap"]}.
